attacking_style: Limited attacking capability shown; appears more reactive than proactive. When present in early moves (Mortirolo), unable to sustain efforts through multiple climbs or respond to best accelerations.
team_tactics: EF Education prioritizes stage hunting over GC support for Carthy, evidenced by domestique duties for Bettiol at Tour de Suisse. Limited visible team protection in critical moments.
terrain_preference: Pure high-altitude climbing suits better than technical multi-climb stages. Exposed roads and crosswinds are significant weaknesses; struggles when pace lifts suddenly on steep gradients.
vulnerability: Crosswinds and exposed terrain cause catastrophic losses (70km pre-climb split at Giro, Vuelta crosswinds). Cannot follow when pace intensifies after domestique support ends. Lacks finishing acceleration for stage wins despite reaching select groups.
key_patterns: Dropped when team pace support ends; lost contact when Vine finished work (2023)
Vulnerable to pre-climb selections in exposed/flat terrain; missed 70km split, crosswind splits (3 instances)
Cannot sustain efforts across multiple climbs; dropped on transitions like Valle Santa Cristina after Mortirolo
Lacks stage-winning acceleration despite reaching break groups; fringe top-10 GC status confirmed
Shows determination fighting back to groups but ultimately shed again on steep sections
form_trajectory: negative: Recent 2023 Giro shows continued struggles matching GC pace when isolated, confirming fringe top-10 ceiling without improvement in weaknesses
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
